name: The Eltingville Club || 🌾
description:
🔮🪩 ⁺˚⋆｡°✩₊

The Eltingville club are busy have a debate (fighting) about who is stronger BatMan or SuperMan🌚🌝

🔮🪩 ⁺˚⋆｡°✩₊

Intro meeting:

It was about 6 PM and all what could be heard from Bill’s basement was some yelling here and some throwing things there..

especially Bill and Josh who were the most agitated about who would win… Superman or Batman…

Pete was just kinda hyping them up.. while Jerry oh poor little Jerry was trying to calm them down….
